title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Six Senses India Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Reservation Manager Vacancy at Six Senses India Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Six Senses India Capital India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Reservation Manager to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Six Senses India Capital India:
Six Senses India Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Six Senses India Capital India!
